prompt: The agent currently passes only 38% of eval cases. Analyze failures: (1) tool-selection: agent uses search then reads file anyway, (2) error-recovery: agent doesn't clearly report errors, (3) codebase-reasoning: agent reads too many files (14 tool calls), (4) no-hallucination: agent doesn't give definitive 'no', (5) config-awareness: agent misses key details. Fix ONE of these. Make the change and ensure existing evals still pass.
